# Synthetic RTLCoder Fixture

This fixture mimics the local RTLCoder layout used by `scripts/dataset/import_rtlcoder_dataset.py`.

The 27K instruction-code dataset "Resyn-27k.json" is described as being generated by GPT-3.5-turbo, and it cannot be guaranteed that all the data are strictly correct.

No explicit dataset license statement is included in this synthetic fixture README.
